_publications._publicationTitle: Magnetic Resonance Fingerprinting to Characterize Childhood and Young Adult Brain Tumors.

_contextSnippet: Among 19 subjects with measurable tumor and CWM regions, the ST component was distinct from CWM on T1 (p = 0.0002) and T2 (p = 0.0003).
details: MRF-derived T1 and T2 values distinguished tumor tissue from contralateral white matter (CWM) with p=0.0002 for T1 and p=0.0003 for T2
